title: incorrect data results for "WHERE int_col <> 0"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (10, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (value, description) VALUES (0, 'Second entry');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results for WHERE clause with not equal operator
